message:
fix(store,lua): fix keyspace notification flag logic and format lua/store code

fr-store: Fix keyspace_events_parse to reset flags to 0 when event
types are specified but neither K nor E is set, matching Redis behavior
(previously left flags unchanged, leaking type-only flags). Reformat
long assertion lines in glob pattern tests. Sort test imports.

fr-command/lua_eval: Reformat long retain() closure line for
readability.

fr-runtime: Minor formatting adjustments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
